svg.text: Each run's round-by-round path in the (value, forecast-move) plane
Candidate L. Each run is a polyline through EVERY measured round: open dot = round 1, small vertices = intermediate rounds, filled arrowhead = final round.
Each path segment is now the same one-round object (Δ value = ρ·σ) as a background field arrow. The 9 scheduled-judge-swap runs are dashed; their swap round is not marked (see key).
OLMo risk grid + judge schedules — 21 runs (9 dashed judge-swap)
one run = a polyline through every round:
open dot = round 1 · small dot = each
intermediate round · filled head = final round
Each segment is one round's move Δ value = ρ·σ —
the same object the faint field arrows draw.
the judge field reads the constant "schedule"
every round, so the swap round is not
identifiable from this file and is not marked.
field: the self-only recurrence Δ value = ρ·σ,
risk panels: field bends toward the walls —
self-description panels: field bends by the
